---
name: Dispute an entry
about: Maintainers can dispute their project's framing or scoring
title: "Dispute: <entry-id>"
labels: ["dispute", "needs-triage"]
---

## Entry

- **Entry ID.** (e.g., `nemo-guardrails`)
- **File path.** (e.g., `registry/governance/nemo-guardrails.yaml`)

## Maintainer identity

Please confirm you are an active maintainer of the catalogued project
(point at a recent commit / merged PR / release).

## What you would like changed

Be specific about which field, sentence, or score is in dispute and what
you propose instead.

## Why

Reference the project's own primary sources (docs, code paths, release
notes) that support the proposed change.

## Process

Per [`GOVERNANCE.md`](../GOVERNANCE.md) §6, the curator will respond
within two weeks with either an accepted change (PR) or a published
rationale for the current state. If unresolved, removal under §3.3 is
available on request.
